extra.reason: Research completed - no implementation needed.
Fixed: child sessions now get agent name registered in GLOBAL_SESSION_AGENT_MAP during session.created
Added concrete task() delegation exemplar to orchestrator prompt
Extended post-tool nudge to monitor glob/grep/ast_grep_search/lsp_diagnostics
Changed to log missing envelopes instead of silently injecting into prompts
Implemented read-budget hook: warning at 3, denial at 5 consecutive reads without delegation
Added per-session metrics logging on read-count reset in read-budget hook
Oracle review complete. Key findings: apply_patch bypasses path-gating (HIGH), planner cannot write plans (functional bug), builder '*' is too broad. New issues created for HIGH items.
Added git remote detection and post-init remote configuration guidance to startup process
Renamed plugin from oh-my-opencode-slim to trans-genderian-orchestra across all files, config paths, and docs. 0 remaining old-name references.
Adapted self-improvement/config skill for Dispatcher: SKILL.md created, registered in skill-loader, tests pass.
Added apply_patch to WRITE_TOOLS and extended extractFilePath to check args.file. Path-gating now catches apply_patch mutations.
Added PLANNER_TOOL_PERMISSIONS with write/edit. Planner can now write plan.md artifacts.
Replaced builder '*' allow with explicit allowlist (read/write/edit/apply_patch/bash/glob/grep/lsp/etc). Task/council remain denied.
Custom agent fallback changed from '*' allow to READ_BASH_TOOL_PERMISSIONS. Custom agents now default to read + bash.
Removed reviewer write dead code from path-gating. Reviewer stays read-only at SDK level.
Added RESEARCHER_TOOL_PERMISSIONS with write/edit. Path-gating researcher case is now reachable, allowing .opencode/notes.md and .opencode/scratchpad.md writes.
Decision: keep consecutive-only tracking. Cumulative counters would not add value — read-budget is for catching runaway deep dives, not normal coordination reads between delegations.
Fixed: TUI sidebar, auto-update notifications, agent index prefix, issue template config path, command-name drift
Fixed: H2 path-gating denial signal switched to is_denied, H3 READ_TOOLS extended, L1 symmetry fixed, M7 councillor gating verified
Fixed: M5 code-block soup cleaned up, L4 exemplar rendering now shows envelope inside prompt parameter
Fixed: M1 test count inconsistencies resolved to 1058, L2 package.json description updated, L6 command name drift fixed
Implemented: configurable log|warn-inject|deny enforcement modes with V2 parser issues surfaced. Default: warn-inject.
Added subtask_summary return protocol to builder, researcher, planner, reviewer, council prompts. Added orchestrator processing instructions.

Implemented all 3 features: grill-with-docs rule in orchestrator prompt, per-agent timeout config (10min/25min), /new-stream and /close-stream commands with state.md stream lifecycle. 1075 tests pass.
Added npx typosquat hardening via package-verify.ts, --yes flag, and rename hygiene lint test. 1075 tests pass.
Fixed package URLs, GITHUB_REPO, error messages, brand asset URL, and README attribution restored. Verified octini owner.

Decided: plan approval gate implemented with user-skip option; builder task:allow kept; prefix matching kept over glob; reviewer gate mandatory with escalation loop (2 rejections→council, council failure→user).
All oracle findings addressed. Full internal quality audit completed. See PR.
